chapter_title: About what a Fasting Person should do if

hadith_entries.text:
354. Narrated Abu-Huraira: 'The Prophet said: "If
anyone of you was invited to a meal, let him accept the
invitation. If he was fasting, let him pray unto Allah (for the
one who invited him)." (At-Termizi)
*

355. Narrated Abu-Huraira: 'The Prophet said: "If
anyone of you was invited while he was observing fasting, let
him say: 'I am fasting."""" (At-Termizi)
*
*
